name: openclaw-fish-audio-tts
description: OpenClaw Fish Audio text-to-speech provider plugin

scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check README.md package.json openclaw.plugin.json index.ts speech-provider.ts tts.ts speech-provider.test.ts tts.test.ts readme.test.ts vitest.config.ts
scripts.lint: oxlint index.ts speech-provider.ts tts.ts speech-provider.test.ts tts.test.ts readme.test.ts vitest.config.ts
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
